title: Former CHS head boy graduates
description: CRADOCK NEWS - A former head boy at Cradock...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRADOCK NEWS - A former head boy at Cradock High School, Lathitha Mbuzwana, recently achieved a BSc in Sport Science at Nelson Mandela University in Gqeberha.","html":"CRADOCK NEWS - A former head boy at Cradock High School, Lathitha Mbuzwana, recently achieved a BSc in Sport Science at Nelson Mandela University in Gqeberha."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Raised by his grandmother with love and grounded in Christian values, Lathitha was enabled to take up tertiary studies through a grant from Amy Bell Charities, a public benefit organisation that serves underprivileged children in the Cradock community."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Amy Bell Charities takes pride in moments like this,\" says Amy Bell Charities director Irvin Tam.","html":"\"Amy Bell Charities takes pride in moments like this,\" says Amy Bell Charities director Irvin Tam."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Lathitha Mbuzwana is a living example of the impact of upliftment through education.","html":"\"Lathitha Mbuzwana is a living example of the impact of upliftment through education."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thank you to all our generous donors for playing a part in helping dreams like Lathitha's become a reality.\"","html":"Thank you to all our generous donors for playing a part in helping dreams like Lathitha's become a reality.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Lathita is now enrolled for his postgraduate studies.","html":"Lathita is now enrolled for his postgraduate studies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
